calendar.matters:
Petition To Void Grant Deed From Trust Estate To Create Joint Tenancy And To Return Real Property To Trust Estate
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for petitioner. Counsel has obtained a waiver of notice from Ms. Traeg. Petition to void Grant Deed is granted with a different finding. Counsel to revise order to show the Grant Deed was prepared in error.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Del Rosario.
